news.title: New book traces slavery, family and early capitalism through rural Louisiana
news.summary_en: ‘Sweet Home Feliciana’ by UChicago’s Rashauna Johnson moves between family memoir and global events to examine how Black history is shaped

news.title: Paolo Cherchi, distinguished Romance philologist and devoted teacher, 1937-2026
news.summary_en: A scholar of extraordinary range, Cherchi guided generations of UChicago students with rigor, curiosity and care
